items.excerpt: Dance-music store Traxsource is rolling out labels from 1 July that distinguish human-made tracks from AI-assisted ones, so listeners can tell them apart. Co-founder Brian Tappert: "We do not believe AI is going away... making sure the value stays where it belongs, with human-created works."

Corus is a new social platform for music and film discovery that deliberately puts human recommendations ahead of the algorithm, pitching person-to-person taste-sharing as an alternative to AI-driven and machine-learning curation.
